route.name: Lower Deschutes Roller Overnighter
route.region: Lower Deschutes River / Maupin / Grass Valley
route.description: Public GPX exposed canyon/high-desert overnighter with gravel, river corridor riding, and serious climbing.
route.surfaceMix: Public GPX exposed canyon/high-desert overnighter with gravel, river corridor riding, and serious climbing.
route.bestSeason: Spring and fall are best; avoid middle of summer and fire season unless conditions are unusually favorable.

difficultyProfile.surface: Public GPX exposed canyon/high-desert overnighter with gravel, river corridor riding, and serious climbing.
difficultyProfile.traffic: review paved connectors and trailhead access
difficultyProfile.technical: moderate unless source notes say otherwise

resources.water: Deschutes River water requires filtering; few refill points away from the river.
resources.food: Grass Valley market and possible Maupin detour; confirm hours.
resources.camping: Deschutes River campsites such as Twin Springs are key options; verify rules and availability.
resources.toiletsShowers: Use mapped waypoints and land-manager pages; confirm current operation before departure.
resources.bikeShops: Identify nearest shops and exact hours during final trip refresh.
resources.longestGap: Measure from imported GPX and source POIs before gate confirmation.
resources.mosquitoes: Seasonal; check recent reports for camp and water-adjacent sections.

tips: Reject for a normal July core weekend.
Only consider with a cool forecast and strong riders.

verification.notes: Public GPX imported and parsed locally. Final legal/resource checks still control gate confirmation.

mapQuality.reviewRule: Route line is imported from public GPX and suitable for planning review.
